title: Manufacturing Engineer - Hero MotoCorp Digital Technologies - Work From Home Available

jsonLd.title: Manufacturing Engineer - Hero MotoCorp Digital Technologies - Work From Home Available
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Manufacturing Engineer with drive and ambition, Hero MotoCorp Digital Technologies in Surat is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Hero MotoCorp Digital Technologies:
Hero MotoCorp Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual performance appraisal
• Life and accident insurance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Surat, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Hero MotoCorp Digital Technologies!
